title: Integrate Streaming into IOManager
impact: Enable streaming for all export operations through the existing IOManager interface

tasks.description: Add Streaming Mode to IOManager.exportGraph - Modify exportGraph to use StreamingExporter for large graphs or when streaming option is set

implementation.logic: Check if shouldStream based on options.streaming or entity count >= threshold

stepByStep: Open src/features/IOManager.ts
Add import for StreamingExporter at the top with other imports
Add import for STREAMING_CONFIG from '../utils/constants.js'
Find the exportGraph method (search for 'async exportGraph')
After getting the filtered graph, add logic to check if streaming should be used
Add: const shouldStream = options?.streaming || (options?.outputPath && graph.entities.length >= STREAMING_CONFIG.STREAMING_THRESHOLD);
Add: if (shouldStream && options?.outputPath) { return this.streamExport(format, graph, options); }
Create new private method streamExport(format, graph, options)
In streamExport: create StreamingExporter with options.outputPath
Switch on format: 'json' -> streamJSONL (note: JSONL is used for JSON streaming), 'csv' -> streamCSV, default -> fallback to in-memory with fs.writeFile
Return ExportResult with streamed: true and outputPath set
Run: npm run typecheck
acceptanceCriteria: Streaming auto-triggers for >= 5000 entities with outputPath
Manual streaming option works with streaming: true

tasks.description: Update ExportResult and ExportOptions Types - Add streaming-related fields to types
stepByStep: Open src/types/types.ts
Find the ExportResult interface
Add: streamed?: boolean;
Add: outputPath?: string;
Find the ExportOptions interface
Add: streaming?: boolean;
Add: outputPath?: string;
Run: npm run typecheck

tasks.description: Add Integration Tests for Streaming Export - Create tests/integration/streaming-export.test.ts

imports: import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest';
testCases: should use in-memory export for small graphs (10 entities)
should stream when explicitly requested (streaming: true)
should stream CSV format correctly (100 entities)
should auto-stream for large graphs (5000+ entities, if testing)

stepByStep: Create new file: tests/integration/streaming-export.test.ts
Add all imports
Create describe('Streaming Export Integration') block
Add beforeEach: create temp dir, create GraphStorage and IOManager
Add afterEach: clean up temp dir
Test 1: Create 10 entities, export without streaming flag, verify result.streamed is falsy
Test 2: Create 10 entities, export with streaming: true and outputPath, verify result.streamed is true and file exists
Test 3: Create 100 entities, export CSV with streaming, verify header and line count
Run: npx vitest run tests/integration/streaming-export.test.ts

tasks.description: Update export_graph Tool Handler - Add streaming options to the export_graph tool handler in toolHandlers.ts
stepByStep: Open src/server/toolHandlers.ts
Find the export_graph case (search for "case 'export_graph'")
Destructure streaming and outputPath from args
Pass streaming and outputPath to ioManager.exportGraph options
In the response, include streamed: result.streamed ?? false
In the response, include outputPath: result.outputPath
Conditionally exclude data from response when streamed (don't send file contents back)
Run: npm run typecheck
Run: npm test
acceptanceCriteria: export_graph handler destructures streaming and outputPath
Data omitted from response when streamed

notes: This sprint integrates the StreamingExporter into the existing IOManager. After this sprint, users can export large graphs efficiently either through automatic threshold detection or explicit streaming option.
